workflow.intent: Restrict CPNI use for marketing purposes
workflow.description: This workflow allows users to restrict the use of their ClearCaptions Personal Information (CPNI) for marketing purposes through various methods.
preconditions: The user has an account on portal.clearcaptions.com or is using a ClearCaptions Phone device.

workflow.intent: Select the face to be animated in D-ID Creative Reality Studio
workflow.description: This workflow provides instructions on how to choose a face for animation within the D-ID Creative Reality Studio.
preconditions: D-ID Creative Reality Studio is open and ready to use

steps.target_description: Avatars tab or option in the main menu
Select an existing pre-made avatar button or link

workflow.intent: GitHub 5-step deep probe across selector tiers
